zh.Albury, Guildford, Surrey, England: 英國英格蘭素瑞阿爾布瑞
zh.Warnham, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可瓦恩哈姆
zh.Warnham, Horsham, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可瓦恩哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當William De Weston於大約1235年出生在英國英格蘭素可瓦恩哈姆時，他的父親Henry de Weston36歲，母親Cecelia de Tangley28歲。他於1270年與Joan de Pontisse在英國英格蘭素可瓦恩哈姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1288年在英國素瑞阿爾布瑞享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William De Weston于大约1235年出生在英国英格兰素可瓦恩哈姆时，他的父亲Henry de Weston36岁，母亲Cecelia de Tangley28岁。他于1270年与Joan de Pontisse在英国英格兰素可瓦恩哈姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1288年在英国素瑞阿爾布瑞享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Weston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Weston, from Old English west ‘west’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

topographic name from Middle English atte west tun(e) ‘at the west farmstead, settlement’ (Old English west + tūn), or from Middle English (bi) weste(n)tune (Old English be westan tūne or be west in tūne), denoting someone who lived either to the west of a settlement or in the western part of a settlement. The latter was a common surname in Sussex.

variants.name: Wesson
meanings: English (Midlands and Kent): variant of   Weston  .
History: John Wesson came from England to Salem, MA, in 1644.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When William De Weston was born about 1235, in Warnham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry de Weston, was 36 and his mother, Cecelia de Tangley, was 28. He married Joan de Pontisse in 1270, in Warnham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1288, in Albury, Surrey, England, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William De Weston est né environ 1235, à Warnham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry de Weston, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Cecelia de Tangley, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Pontisse en 1270, à Warnham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1288, à Albury, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William De Weston um 1235 in Warnham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Weston 36 und seine Mutter Cecelia de Tangley 28. Er hat 1270 in Warnham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Joan de Pontisse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1288 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Albury, Surrey, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William De Weston è nato il circa 1235 nel Warnham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry de Weston, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Cecelia de Tangley, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Pontisse nel 1270, nel Warnham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1288, nel Albury, Surrey, England, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William De Westonが約1235年にイギリスイギリススセックスワーンハムで生まれた時，父Henry de Westonは36歳，母Cecelia de Tangleyは28歳であった。1270年にイギリスイギリススセックスワーンハムでJoan de Pontisseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1288年にイギリススリーアルブリーで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William De Weston(이)가 대략 1235년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 워함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Weston(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecelia de Tangley(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 워함에서 Joan de Pontisse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1288년 영국 수리 알버이에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William De Weston nasceu aproximadamente 1235, em Warnham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry de Weston, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Cecelia de Tangley, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Pontisse em 1270, em Warnham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1288, em Albury, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William De Weston родился около 1235 г. в местности варнам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry de Weston было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecelia de Tangley, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Pontisse в 1270 г. в местности варнам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1288 г. в местности албури, сурри, Англия в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William De Weston nació aproximadamente 1235, en Warnham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry de Weston, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Cecelia de Tangley, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Joan de Pontisse en 1270, en Warnham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1288, en Albury, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años.
